name: Octopus Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Tomatoes, peeled and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully wash and dry the octopus. Remove the mouth.
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan. Add rosemary, bay leaf, oregano, cumin seeds, chopped parsley, chili pepper, and minced garlic.
3. Place the octopus on top of the mixture and season with salt and pepper.
4. Cover the pot tightly and simmer for about 45 minutes.
5. Cook spaghetti in plenty of boiling salted water until it is 'al dente' (firm to the bite).
6. Drain and transfer the spaghetti to a warm serving dish.
7. Mix the octopus sauce into the cooked spaghetti.
8. Serve hot.
